overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through an industrial urban district at dusk. The character moves from a sidewalk alongside a glass industrial building, across a multi-lane intersection with neon-lit commercial buildings, and into a dark concrete underpass beneath an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk alongside glass commercial building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a large industrial glass building, approaching a major intersection with smokestacks visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall industrial building with reflective blue-tinted glass windows and concrete base
modern T-shaped street lamp with orange light fixture
industrial smokestacks emitting smoke against the sunset sky
large concrete elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the district

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a concrete sidewalk beside a modern industrial building with reflective glass facades. The setting sun creates a warm golden-hour glow, backlighting the industrial smokestacks in the distance. Sparse traffic moves along the multi-lane road to the right, and an elevated highway structure looms in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with neon commercial buildings

events.description: character turns left to cross the multi-lane street toward the underpass entrance
traffic light changes to green as vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: turning left and crossing the wide street, navigating toward the underpass while avoiding vehicles and passing pedestrians on the corner

notable_agents.action: person standing at the street corner waiting to cross the road
dark-colored sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: multi-story commercial building with yellow structural accents and illuminated signage
large orange billboard with 'Ken' text visible against the sky
traffic signal showing green light for vehicles

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and crosses the wide asphalt intersection, moving away from the glass building toward a more open industrial plaza. Neon-lit commercial buildings become prominent on the right, and a large 'Ken' billboard appears in the distance. Vehicles move through the intersection as the traffic light changes, and the elevated highway structure draws closer overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass beneath elevated highway with scattered debris

events.description: entering the dark concrete underpass beneath the elevated highway structure
ambient light drops significantly as the camera moves deeper under the overpass into shadow

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass, passing cardboard boxes and debris, following a pedestrian ahead toward the distant exit

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead through the underpass toward the exit

entered.detail: massive concrete ceiling of the elevated highway creating a tunnel-like effect
thick concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway structure
stacked cardboard boxes and debris piled against the underpass wall
metal pipe railing along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark concrete underpass beneath the elevated highway, transitioning from the open intersection into a sheltered, shadowy corridor. The ambient lighting drops significantly, with only artificial lights and the distant exit providing illumination. Cardboard boxes and debris litter the ground near closed metal shutters, while a pedestrian walks ahead toward the bright exit where palm trees are visible against the evening sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sun-drenched industrial sidewalk into the oppressive shadows of a concrete underpass. It begins by moving along a reflective glass facade under a warm golden-hour glow, with distant smokestacks backlit by the setting sun. As the camera turns left to cross a wide asphalt intersection, the open light of the plaza gives way to the glow of neon-lit commercial buildings and a prominent billboard. The scene then shifts abruptly as the camera moves beneath the looming elevated highway, transitioning from the bright intersection into a dark, sheltered corridor littered with debris and closed metal shutters. Finally, the perspective follows a distant pedestrian through the dim underpass toward a bright exit where palm trees stand against the deepening evening sky.
